summary: The diff implements all six requirements with good coverage. REQ-1 (floating chatbot with keyword Q&A), REQ-2 (query form in chatbot), REQ-3 (backend submitQueryForm/getAllQueryForms), REQ-4 (calculator with name/mobile), REQ-5 (admin panel with hardcoded credentials), and REQ-6 (backend calculator leads) are all present. One notable gap is that the backend getAllQueryForms and getAllCalculatorLeads enforce Internet Identity admin role checks, while the frontend admin panel authenticates via hardcoded credentials only, creating a functional mismatch. Data persistence via migration module is present but initializes empty lists.

missing_requirements.requirement: Data persists across canister upgrades for query submissions
missing_requirements.reason: The migration module initializes queryForms as an empty List, meaning existing submissions would be lost on upgrade. The diff does not show stable variable declarations in main.mo that would survive upgrades.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin panel can successfully retrieve all query submissions and calculator leads via backend methods
missing_requirements.reason: The backend getAllQueryForms and getAllCalculatorLeads methods enforce Internet Identity admin role checks via AccessControl. The frontend admin panel uses hardcoded credentials with no II authentication, so the actor will call these methods as an anonymous or non-admin principal and the calls will fail with an authorization trap.

missing_requirements.requirement: Data persists across canister upgrades for calculator leads
missing_requirements.reason: Same as REQ-3 — the migration module initializes calculatorLeads as an empty List, and no stable variable declarations are visible in the truncated main.mo diff.

hallucinated_features.description: AdminInquiries component for II-authenticated admins retained alongside the new AdminPanel
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies creating a new Admin Panel with hardcoded login. The AdminInquiries section for Internet Identity admins was not requested and goes beyond the stated requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Separate backend/migration.mo file as a dedicated migration module
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires data persistence across upgrades, not a specific migration module architecture. This is an unrequested implementation detail.
